message.content:
@startuml
title Digital Public Goods Backlog
subtitle: Basic architecture

actor User as User1
actor User as User2

interface backlog.dpg.net as Backend1
interface api.backlog.dpg.net as API1
interface Database as DB1
interface Database as DB2

User1 --> Backend1 : HTTP GET /projects
Backend1 --> API1 : HTTP GET /projects
API1 --> DB1 : Query the projects table
DB1 --> API1 : Return the results
API1 --> Backend1 : JSON response
Backend1 --> User2 : HTML response

@enduml
